items.hintDe: Setze doesn't vor die Grundform und nimm das -s vom Verb weg.
items.explainDe: Aus likes wird doesn't like: das -s wandert zu doesn't, das Verb bleibt in der Grundform: He doesn't like peas.

provenance.note: Negative form used: don't like / do not like (flag don't, do not for grant). English answers gate-clean (I, like, fish).

items.hintDe: kein + Verb wird im Englischen don't + like.
items.explainDe: mögen heißt to like. Bei I verneinst du mit don't: I don't like fish.

provenance.note: Negative form used: doesn't like / does not like (flag doesn't, does not for grant). English answers gate-clean (sister, like, rice).

answers.text: My sister does not like rice.

items.hintDe: My sister ist wie she, also doesn't + Grundform.
items.explainDe: My sister = she, also doesn't like: My sister doesn't like rice.

provenance.note: Negative form used: don't like (English prompt) (flag don't for grant). English prompt gate-clean (I, like, soup); German answers du-form.

items.hintDe: don't like heißt mag nicht / mag kein.
items.explainDe: I don't like soup heißt Ich mag keine Suppe. don't drückt die Verneinung aus.
